templates.name: Do you offer exchanges?
templates.content: Unfortunately, we don't do exchanges anymore, so you will have to return the order.

templates.name: Sales Collection
templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://ba-sh.com/us/sale/

templates.name: I emailed and haven't heard back
templates.content: Sorry to hear that! We just resolved a returns portal issue that started over the weekend. Due to this, we are a little behind but rest assured our team is working fast to get to all queries!

templates.name: How long do I have to wait for a refund?
templates.content: We try to process refunds as quickly as possible. Please give us 2-3 business days to process the return, and then another 5-8 business days for the amount to be reissued to your credit card or bank.

templates.name: Is delivery of an online order to a store possible?
templates.content: It is possible, however, you will have to contact us at cs@ba-sh.com first.

templates.name: Where do you ship from?
templates.content: We deliver our items to you straight from our French warehouse.

templates.name: Birthday Code Not Working
templates.content: There's a minimum spend and expiration date for this discount code. Also, pieces from capsule collections, Something Navy collaboration shoes, charity pieces, jewelry, and eyewear are excluded from this offer. It can't be combined with any other offers or codes.

templates.name: Return Policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://ba-sh.com/us/returns-refund-worldwide.html

templates.name: Borrow Program Details
templates.content: Borrow is our try-before-you-buy program. You can rent iconic ba&sh pieces at a fraction of the price for upcoming events, holiday celebrations, or refreshing wardrobe upgrades. First, select your preferred color and size. If the item is available, the borrow button will appear. You can return, extend, or purchase your item before your borrow period ends through Ensemble, the third party that fulfills your borrow order. Once your Borrow order is placed, you can contact the Ensemble team directly!

templates.name: What is CCVA?
templates.content: CCVA is a type of eco-friendly leather derived from coal.

templates.name: Welcome Code Not Working
templates.content: The welcome code is only valid on orders of select full-price items. Exclusions do apply on collaboration pieces, capsule collections, and a few other pieces not eligible for any discount. It cannot be combined with any other offers or codes, and cannot be applied to discounted items.

templates.name: Can I expedite shipping?
templates.content: All orders are shipped express, so we're unable to further expedite shipping.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: Thanks for your interest! You can sign up for our Affiliate Program here: https://www.shareasale.com/shareasale.cfm?merchantID=77300 For other sponsorship inquiries, please email us directly at cs@ba-sh.com. Our team is happy to chat!

templates.name: Social Media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/bashparis/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/bashparis/

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on all domestic orders.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 1 (855) 422-1127 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://ba-sh.com/us/stores

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 1-3 business days and we usually ship via DHL. Once shipped, it will take 3-10 business days for domestic orders.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address and the change you'd like to make?

templates.name: Can I exchange/return an online order at a retail store?
templates.content: I'm afraid online orders can't be returned at a retail store. You'd have to process your return/exchange online through your ba&sh account.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at cs@ba-sh.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Happy to help you find the right size! Our clothes generally run true to size. Would you mind sharing your usual size?

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://ba-sh.com/us/sale/

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at cs@ba-sh.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: I don’t have a printer to print my return label
templates.content: Once your return note has been verified on your customer account, you can write the following information on plain paper and attach it to your order: the date, your contact details, and your return number.

templates.name: Where can I find your secondhand shop?
templates.content: You can find our secondhand website here: https://secondhand.ba-sh.com At the moment, the items listed here are only available online and not in-store.

templates.name: Size Chart: Women - Clothes and Shoes
templates.content: You can take a look at our women's size charts here: https://ba-sh.com/us/size-guide

templates.name: Do you offer price adjustments?
templates.content: I'm afraid we don't offer price adjustments at the moment. I apologize for the inconvenience!
